candidate_blockers.detail: Probe offset decoupling is diagnostic-only evidence.
Per-face one-sided pressure support is not implemented yet.
Rows isolate marker/probe sensitivity without selecting a formulation.
Rows reuse one flow snapshot and do not advance coupled FSI.

rows.scope_limit: shared snapshot sampling-only traction probe offset decoupling diagnostic on archived shared preflow velocity/pressure/obstacle fields; does not advance coupled FSI and does not claim Fluent parity.
